query:
-- Full tiab_customers match status summary
SELECT 
  matchType,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked
FROM tiab_customers
GROUP BY matchType;

  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked
FROM tiab_customers
